channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: BitTorrent’s disastrous, legendary, and controversial story
item.description: Twenty-five years ago today, a young, little-known programmer by the name of Bram Cohen fired off a short message to a mailing list for peer-to-peer enthusiasts. "My new app, BitTorrent, is now in...

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5: What "Most Agentic" Actually Means in Practice
item.description: Anthropic shipped Claude Sonnet 5 on June 30. Their framing: "the most agentic Sonnet model yet." If you've been following the Sonnet line, that claim has a specific context worth unpacking....

item.title: Stop Writing TypeScript Interfaces by Hand
item.description: If you've ever copied a huge JSON response from an API and started manually writing TypeScript interfaces... interface User { id: number; name: string; email: string; ... } ...you know how boring...

item.title: High-Frequency Trading: Like a Boss in Dark Souls
item.description: The Quest Begins (The "Why") Honestly, I started down this rabbit hole because I kept hearing the same hype: “HFT firms make millions in microseconds!” My buddy at a fintech startup bragged about...

item.title: Fable 5 Changed What I Expect From an AI Agent. So I Built ClawBase Premium Around It.
item.description: Three weeks ago, I wrote about losing access to Fable 5 after 72 hours. The government pulled it offline before most developers even got a chance to try it. That article hit a nerve — turns out a...

item.title: Meta building cloud business to sell excess AI capacity
item.description: Article URL: https://www.reuters.com/business/meta-sell-excess-ai-computing-capacity-via-cloud-business-bloomberg-news-reports-2026-07-01/ Comments URL:...

item.title: Shipping Reusable Env Schemas
item.description: Your library needs DATABASE_URL. Another needs JWT_SECRET. Instead of documenting requirements in a README that goes stale, ship them as CtroEnv schemas. Publishing a Schema from Your Library...

item.title: Securing the code that decides who Entra trusts: a Function App and a Logic App, end to end
item.description: Part 1 of this series, [[Entra-Extensibility-Is-Control-Plane]], made the case that every Microsoft Entra extension point hands a piece of the Entra trust boundary to a system Entra does not own....

item.title: Testing and Debugging Your Env Config
item.description: Environment variables are global state. Testing them usually means mutating process.env and hoping you clean up after. CtroEnv gives you better tools. Testing with objectSource objectSource()...

item.title: I Built a CFP Submission Tracker in Notion — Here's the Free Template
item.description: Last year I spoke at 12 conferences. By conference number 6, my system of browser bookmarks and calendar reminders was falling apart. I'd discover a great CFP on Twitter, bookmark it, then forget...

item.title: The MCP Release Candidate Survival Guide: Apps, Auth, Deprecations, and Tool Schemas
item.description: The MCP 2026-07-28 release candidate is the largest major specification revision since MCP launched. It is also a compatibility test for everyone building clients, servers, SDKs, gateways, and...

item.title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
item.description: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the...

item.title: Meta Is Charging a Subscription for Smart Glasses Features. Welcome to the New Era of Consumer Tech
item.description: You bought the hardware. Now you’ll need to subscribe for “expanded access” to the most advanced features.

item.title: Amazon has enough satellites to launch its Starlink competitor
item.description: Amazon says it now has enough satellites operating in low-Earth orbit to light up its Starlink internet competitor. With last night's launch, Amazon Leo has 396 satellites deployed, which is...

item.title: AI Agent Exploits Langflow RCE to Automate Database Ransomware Attack
item.description: Security firm Sysdig says it has found what it believes is the first ransomware attack run from start to finish by an AI agent. Its Threat Research Team calls the operator JADEPUFFER and says a...

item.title: Why California’s carbon manure math doesn’t add up
item.description: Something stinks in California’s climate policies. Years ago, the state set up a system that pays cattle farmers across the country to turn the methane emitted from cattle manure into natural gas,...

item.title: FortiBleed Credential Theft Linked to INC and Lynx Ransomware Operations
item.description: The recently discovered financially-motivated FortiBleed campaign has been attributed to INC and Lynx ransomware operations, indicating that the verified, stolen credentials were intended for...

item.title: New ChocoPoC RAT Targets Vulnerability Researchers via Fake PoC Exploit Repos
item.description: Attackers are hiding a data-stealing trojan inside fake exploit code aimed at the people who hunt bugs for a living. The malware, called ChocoPoC, travels in Python proof-of-concept (PoC)...

item.title: SharePoint RCE CVE-2026-45659 Added to CISA KEV After Active Exploitation
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Wednesday added a high-severity flaw impacting Microsoft SharePoint Server to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog,...

item.title: Indian tech tycoon bets $30M of his own money to build AI alternative to Microsoft Office
item.description: Neo is Bhavin Turakhia’s fifth venture and his latest involving enterprise software. This time he's taking on Microsoft Office, Google Apps with AI.

item.title: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
item.description: Apple is working on a "revamped" version of its entry-level MacBook Pro that it could launch as soon as the first half of 2027, Bloomberg reports. The company is also testing four new iPad Pros...

item.title: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
item.description: Cody Spencer, the co-owner of the small games retail chain Pink Gorilla Games, put it well when I asked about the impact of Sony's recent announcement that it will stop making discs for new games...

item.title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
item.description: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.

item.title: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft’s looming layoffs and studio closures
item.description: Xbox is making some big changes — again. On June 10th, a few months after Asha Sharma took over as CEO, she and newly promoted chief content officer Matt Booty sent a memo to staff warning of an...

item.title: Goose, a New Gay Dating App, Appears to Be a Psyop
item.description: Touted as a less-hookup-focused Grindr, Goose is an invite-only space for gay men. The problem is the people promoting it don’t seem real.

item.title: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype
item.description: Elon Musk says a report about a SpaceX AI phone prototype is "utterly false." The report, published on Wednesday by The Wall Street Journal, says SpaceX showed off a "handset-like prototype" to...

item.title: Unpatched Argo CD Repo-Server Flaw Could Let Attackers Take Over Kubernetes Clusters
item.description: Argo CD, a widely used tool for deploying software to Kubernetes, has an unpatched flaw in its repo-server component that lets an unauthenticated attacker run code, provided they can reach the...

item.title: 19-Year-Old Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to Face U.S. Hacking Charges
item.description: A teenager accused of belonging to the hacking group Scattered Spider has been extradited from Finland to face U.S. charges of conspiracy, computer intrusion, and fraud, the U.S. Department of...

item.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
item.description: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

item.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
item.description: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the...
